inputs.reasoning: Many alternatives create many kInstAlt nodes, exercising the alt switch(arg) branches in BitState
Star repetitions generate kInstAltMatch instructions, exercising greedy/non-greedy paths
Deeply nested alternations with captures create many stack jobs, potentially triggering GrowStack
Multiple capture groups with alternation exercises kInstCapture and kInstAlt opcodes in TrySearch
Large counted repetition creates many ByteRange instructions, exercises p<end check repeatedly
Nested star creates complex alternation structure, forces CheckAndLoop and ShouldVisit checks
Non-capturing groups with alternation and stars generates AltMatch, exercises while(njob_>0) loop heavily
Many optional elements create large number of alt nodes, stressing the job stack and GrowStack
Character class alternation with repetition exercises ByteRange matching and kInstCapture with saves
Multiple complex alternatives force many Push calls, exercising njob_>=maxjob_ check and ShouldVisit
